name: Moga Source
subtitle: Official sideloading source for Moga, a manga reader client for MangaDex
description: This is the official sideloading source for Moga, a manga reader client for MangaDex. Use this if you don't want to deal with TestFlight.

apps.name: Moga
apps.subtitle: A pretty nice manga reader if I do say so myself
apps.localizedDescription:
Moga is a manga reader app built to interface with MangaDex's vast library, with usability and gesture-based UX design at its core.

- Read anything available in MangaDex's library directly
- Log in to your account
- Follow/unfollow mangas
- See recently updated mangas you've followed
- Easy pick-back-up shortcuts (client side)
- Minimize/juggle two mangas at the same time (client side)
- Set language/content preferences (client side)
- And so on.

This app requires that you generate a private client ID if you wish to log in. See https://moga.moe for more info.

versions.localizedDescription:
# release/1.2-4

Changes since release/1.2-3

- 1.2 Build 4 (1470626, 2026-04-13)
- Fix login view SDK warnings (ee0aea6, 2026-04-13)
- Improve logged-out and login UX (f46ec77, 2026-04-13)
- Localize remaining static download and status UI strings (5a3eb4e, 2026-04-12)

# release/1.2-3

Changes since release/1.2-2

- 1.2 Build 3 (212ef0d, 2026-04-11)
- Suppress reconnect alert in offline downloads mode (aa19141, 2026-04-11)
- Fix offline reader and read status sync crashes (85b6f23, 2026-04-11)

# release/1.2-2

Changes since release/1.2-1

- 1.2 Build 2 (7b30f92, 2026-04-11)
- Show downloaded manga details with offline metadata (e5c4c40, 2026-04-11)
- Sort downloaded chapters before saving (6a3f2b0, 2026-04-11)

# release/1.2-1

Changes since release/1.1-15

- 1.2 Build 1 (a47dd26, 2026-04-11)
- Localize downloads and MangaDex status strings (0dbc540, 2026-04-11)

- Add setting to skip downloading read chapters (a00de12, 2026-04-11)
- Show alert when no manga downloads are queued (653f02c, 2026-04-11)
- Add download cancellation and chapter deduping (6f9daac, 2026-04-11)
- Show download progress in Library and Downloads (090ee21, 2026-04-11)
- Add download queue status and deletion support (5c2677a, 2026-04-11)
- Offline mangas and downloading first pass (da50dc6, 2026-04-10)
- Move chapter read status notifications into services (ef92998, 2026-04-10)

# release/1.1-15

- 1.1 Build 15 (da2926a, 2026-04-04)
- Fix About header relayout after presentation (d2d9d33, 2026-04-04)
- Restore Profile cell highlight behavior (bb7a916, 2026-04-04)
- Fix status view footer layout and cache components (473a6b7, 2026-04-04)
- Move folder (3ce8c52, 2026-04-04)
- Refactor distinct classes into separate files (a8e06ba, 2026-04-04)
- Native status API display first pass (d2a144e, 2026-04-04)

- 1.1 Build 14 (f7781e9, 2026-03-29)

- Fix chapter read status not updating in chapters list after pull-to-advance (840ad0b, 2026-03-28)
- Update footer sizing (049ec96, 2026-03-28)

- Show footer in horizontal paging mode; fix overscroll threshold (4b4da4e, 2026-03-29)
- Apply content mode immediately when useAspectFitMode changes (7e5f00c, 2026-03-29)
- Gate overscroll animation on canScrollAdvance in scrollViewDidScroll (587a11d, 2026-03-29)
- Guard overscroll-advance state around scroll/reading direction switches (61fe3e3, 2026-03-29)
- Hide Reading Direction in vertical mode; restore horizontal overscroll advance (38f811e, 2026-03-29)
- Add horizontal paging mode and View Options menu to reader (0692086, 2026-03-28)
- Reduce reader debug churn and clean up refresh timers (d3a8ce3, 2026-03-27)
